title: Spinner radar animé
description: Spinner SVG : 3 cercles concentriques + croix de coordonnées + arc de progression rotatif (animation spin 3s linear infinite). Texte central optionnel.

render.svg:
<svg width="160" height="160" viewBox="0 0 160 160">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="spinGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="var(--ct-text-strong)" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="var(--ct-surface-3)" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="70" fill="none" stroke="var(--ct-surface-2)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 4"></circle>
  <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="50" fill="none" stroke="var(--ct-surface-2)" stroke-width="1"></circle>
  <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="30" fill="none" stroke="var(--ct-surface-2)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 4"></circle>
  <line x1="80" y1="10" x2="80" y2="150" stroke="var(--ct-surface-2)" stroke-width="1"></line>
  <line x1="10" y1="80" x2="150" y2="80" stroke="var(--ct-surface-2)" stroke-width="1"></line>
  <g style="animation: spin {{duration}} linear infinite; transform-origin: 80px 80px;">
    <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="50" fill="none" stroke="url(#spinGrad)" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="100 250" stroke-linecap="round"></circle>
    <circle cx="80" cy="30" r="3" fill="var(--ct-text-strong)"></circle>
  </g>
  <text x="80" y="84" fill="var(--ct-text-primary)" font-size="11" font-weight="600" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="0.1em">{{centerText}}</text>
</svg>
render.css:
.spinner-container { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-top: auto; margin-bottom: auto; }
@keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
